title: CopilotKit: The Problem with AI Chatbots in SaaS Apps
summary: CopilotKit is a framework that enables developers to move beyond bolted-on chatbot windows by allowing AI agents to render real UI components, share state with React and Next.js apps, and support human-in-the-loop approval workflows. It addresses the problem of disconnected AI features in SaaS applications by tightly integrating agent capabilities with frontend rendering.
writeup: This video covers CopilotKit, a framework for integrating AI agents into SaaS applications beyond the standard bolted-on chatbot window. It frames the core problem as disconnected AI features, where chat lives in isolation from the app's interface and data. The key capabilities: agents can render real UI components, share state with React and Next.js apps, and support human-in-the-loop approval workflows, which ties agent actions directly to frontend rendering.
